investments-in-2016.notes: Hint: use CTE, concat subquery for location, use exclusive logic using count and group

consecutive-numbers.notes: Hint: CTE full join using union

department-top-three-salaries.notes: Hint: CTE + inner join + dense_rank with partition to rank

tree-node.notes: Hint: use case and subquery to see if a node already exists as a p_id

customers-who-bought-all-products.notes: Hint: group by id, then use having and subquery counter

immediate-food-delivery-ii.notes: Hint: case to add to immediate orders, subquery to filter for first orders, don't use CTE

trips-and-users.notes: Hint: CTE and double inner join to filter banned users, case to sum cancels, and group by date
